ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface IDayMode


  • public interface IDayMode
    Day mode brightness functions (CSD/PSD/RSD), \nIf you want to change the theme of the application, try to use UiModeManager \nand application resource with -night or -notnight

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IDayMode.DayModeSettings 
      static interface  IDayMode.Functions 

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BRIGHTNESS_DAYMODE
      diff mode light adjust 选项：白天模式、夜间模式、自动模式，不同模式的亮度调节 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDayMode.DayModeSettings property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-03 09:14:08
      static int DAYMODE_SETTING
      Day mode setting<br> 日夜模式设置<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDayMode.DayModeSettings property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:00:23
      static int FUNC_BRIGHTNESS
      Deprecated. 
      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#DISPLAY_BRIGHTNESS instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_MAX
      Max brightness of CCD, read only CCD(CSD/PSD/RSD)最大亮度，原类型float，改成int,原ID为SETTING_FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_MAX ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 11:39:22
      static int FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_MIN
      Min brightness of CCD, read only CCD(CSD/PSD/RSD)最小亮度，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_BRIGHTNESS_MIN ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 11:40:01
      static int SUN_TIME
      Sunrise and sunset mode time (24h) 日出日落模式时间(24h) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 比如设置10201830，代表了日出10:20，日落18:30 deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-15 14:21:05

      • FUNC_BRIGHTNESS

        @Deprecated
static final int FUNC_BRIGHTNESS
        Deprecated. using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#DISPLAY_BRIGHTNESS instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
        CSD brightness value CSD当前亮度值，屏幕亮度，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_BRIGHTNESS,老版本是float，改成int
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE

        wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 11:37:35
